options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: advancement_check_difficulty
options.description:
Sets what types of minecraft advancements that will be locations and considered for logic.
valid options for base Minecraft are ["task", "goal", "challenge"]

options.name: activated_modules
options.description:
Sets which modules are activated.
valid options are ["Advancements", "FTBQuests"]

options.name: ftb_quest_check_shape
options.description:
Shapes of FTB quests that will be locations and considered for logic.
valid options for base FTB Quests are ["circle", "square", "rsquare", "diamond", "pentagon", "hexagon", "octagon", "heart", "gear", "none"]

options.name: unlock_type
options.description:
Controls how locations are accessed.
Tab type gives access to a page of advancements/quests at a time.
Tree type gives access to the dependants of an advancements/quests

options.name: final_goal
options.description:
The Goal of the Randomizer.
Use a custom advancement by using it's resource name ie. "adv minecraft:adventure/adventuring_time"
Format: "<type> <advancement_name|quest_name>"
type = one of [adv, ftb]

options.name: advancement_checks_give_items
options.description: Whether to give the item shown in the advancement icon when getting an advancement check.

options.name: quest_checks_give_rewards
options.description: Whether to give quest rewards when getting an ftb quests check.

options.name: filler_items
options.description:
Items to use as filler.
Items must be in format <amount> <item_name>: <weight>
Example: 1 minecraft:iron_ingot: 1

options.name: death_link
options.description: When you die, everyone who enabled death link dies. Of course, the reverse is true too.

options.name: checks
options.display_name: Checks (IF YOU DON'T EDIT THIS THE GAME WON'T GENERATE)
options.description: Advancements and quests from the game.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: '"adv minecraft:story/root": 1'
Format: "<type> <item_name>": 1
Type one of [adv, ftb, item]

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.
